title: FIGS Analyst Ratings and Price Targets - Benzinga
text: FIGS has consensus rating of Moderate Buy based on 5 buy ratings, 3 hold ratings and 0 sell ratings from analyst coverage. Average price target for FIGS is $17.75, with 9.77% upside potential. Analyst consensus rating varies across sources from Hold to Moderate Buy. Price targets range from $7.61 to $20.00 with average around $15-17. Recent analyst actions include price target raises and upgrades reflecting Q1 2026 beat and raised guidance. KeyBanc raised price target to $19 from $17. Oppenheimer upgraded to Outperform from Perform. Analysts focused on international expansion opportunity, margin sustainability, and management execution on growth initiatives.
